title: Another Pale Garden Backport
description: Another Pale Garden backport adds.. well that.
body:
Experience the silence of the Pale Garden now in Minecraft 1.21.1! This mod faithfully backports the features from the Garden Awakens Drop, bringing the beautiful Pale Garden biome, its unique blocks, and its Mobs straight to your world.

Features

###The Pale Garden Biome###

Pale Oak Trees

Pale Moss Patches

Pale Pumpkin Patches


###The Creaking###

Creaking Spawn Egg

Creaking Heart


###Pale Oak Wood Set###

Pale Oak Log

Pale Oak Wood

Stripped Pale Oak Log

Stripped Pale Oak Wood

Pale Oak Planks

Pale Oak Stairs

Pale Oak Slabs

Pale Oak Fence

Pale Oak Fence Gate

Pale Oak Door 

Pale Oak Trapdoor

Pale Oak Pressure Plate

Pale Oak Button

Pale Oak Leaves

Pale Oak Sapling

Pale Oak Sign

Pale Oak Hanging Sign

Pale Oak Boat

Pale Oak Chest Boat


###Resin###

Resin Clumps

Resin Block

Resin Bricks

Resin Bricks Slab, Stairs, and Walls

Chiseled Resin Bricks


###Plants###

Pale Moss

Pale Moss Carpet

Pale Hanging Moss

Open Eyeblossom

Closed Eyeblossom


###Extras###

Pale Pumpkins

Carved Pale Pumpkins

Pale Jack O'Lanterns

Pale Pumpkin Seeds

Pale Pumpkin Pie

Pale Snow Golems


⚙️ Requirements

NeoForge 1.21.1

Required Dependency: TerraBlender 1.21.1 Version 4.1.0.8
https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender/versions?g=1.21.1&l=neoforge
